message:
feat(mattermost): implement full connector with WebSocket events, threads, files, and reactions

Major expansion from scaffold to full V3 implementation: 17 operations,
WebSocket event stream, ConnectorRuntime, RetryLoop. Add auth_token(),
websocket_url(), upload_file(), get_thread, add_reaction, channel_members.
Standardize main.rs protocol loop. Add manifest operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -110,6 +110,52 @@ deny_localhost = true
 deny_private_ranges = false
 require_sni = true
 
+[provides.operations."mattermost.get_team"]
+description = "Get a team by ID"
+capability = "mattermost.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.get_team".input_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.get_team".output_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.get_team".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["*.example.com"]
+port_allow = [443, 8065]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = false
+require_sni = true
+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.get_channels_for_team"]

+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []

+deny_private_ranges = false
+require_sni = true
+
 [provides.operations."mattermost.get_channel"]
 description = "Get a channel by ID"
 capability = "mattermost.read"

+[provides.operations."mattermost.get_file_infos_for_post"]

+# ── Events ──
+
+[provides.events."mattermost.posted"]
+description = "Mattermost websocket post-created event"

+replay = false
+
+[provides.events."mattermost.post_edited"]

+streaming = true
+replay = false
+
+[provides.events."mattermost.post_deleted"]

+[provides.events."mattermost.reaction_added"]

+

+[provides.events."mattermost.thread_updated"]

+
+[provides.events."mattermost.typing"]
+description = "Mattermost websocket typing indicator event"
+streaming = true
+replay = false
+
+[event_caps]
+streaming = true
+replay = false
+min_buffer_events = 256
+
 # ── Write Operations ──
 
 [provides.operations."mattermost.create_post"]
